mapper.select: select a.id,a.user_id,a.create_time,a.concat_person,a.contact_phone,a.province_code, a.city_code,a.country_code,a.address,a.if_default,a.state,a.update_time,a.deleted, concat(c1.city_name,c2.city_name,c3.city_name,a.address) as fullAddress from cm_user_address a left join city_code c1 on a.province_code = c1.city_id left join city_code c2 on a.city_code = c2.city_id left join city_code c3 on a.country_code = c3.city_id where a.deleted = '0' and a.state = '1' and a.user_id = #{userId}

select a.id,a.user_id,a.create_time,a.concat_person,a.contact_phone,a.province_code, a.city_code,a.country_code,a.address,a.if_default,a.state,a.update_time,a.deleted, concat(c1.city_name,c2.city_name,c3.city_name,a.address) as fullAddress from cm_user_address a left join city_code c1 on a.province_code = c1.city_id left join city_code c2 on a.city_code = c2.city_id left join city_code c3 on a.country_code = c3.city_id where a.deleted = '0' and a.state = '1' and a.id = #{id}

select a.id,a.user_id,a.create_time,a.concat_person,a.contact_phone,a.province_code, a.city_code,a.country_code,a.address,a.if_default,a.state,a.update_time,a.deleted, concat(c1.city_name,c2.city_name,c3.city_name,a.address) as fullAddress from cm_user_address a left join city_code c1 on a.province_code = c1.city_id left join city_code c2 on a.city_code = c2.city_id left join city_code c3 on a.country_code = c3.city_id where a.deleted = '0' and a.if_default = '1' and a.state = '1' and a.user_id = #{userId}
select count(*) from cm_user_address where state = '1' and deleted = '0' and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update cm_user_address set if_default = '0' where user_id = #{userId}
